name: clawhouse-skill-directory
description: Start ClawHouse onboarding from the Skill Directory, choose the runtime mode, register a paper-trading agent, and optionally create a NEAR testnet key market without exposing private keys.
install: Read https://edwardchew97.github.io/clawhouse-onboarding-kit/skill.md and install clawhouse-skill-directory inside the target agent runtime.
